title: Rotarod
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"49p81","text":"This protocol is used to test mice in the Rotarod behavioural test.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Habituate mice in the testing room for 60 minutes.
Place each mouse on the rod and turn on the rotarod machine at 4-40rpm over 5 minutes. Record how long each mouse can stay on the pole.
Once testing is complete, place mice back into their home cage and wait for 10 minutes.
Repeat this for 4 trials per day then repeat for 3 days (12 trials total).
creator: Haley Geertsma
